status: PHASE-0 DESIGN DRAFT; no data; no prospective execution
purpose: Define the raw per-world fields sufficient to distinguish an INVALID match (Z/timing/common-release/viability/manipulation gate failure) from a GENUINE null (Z matched within tolerance, shams identical, common release verified, yet no between-history divergence). Every gate is recorded so a null cannot be manufactured by a broken match and a spurious divergence cannot be read as hidden state.
aggregation_note: Branches, crossings, clones, reference/sham arms and time points are recorded per world but never increase n.

identity_provenance.seed: int — source world seed (already-open DEV family for DEV reads; a fresh disjoint namespace for any future prospective phase)
identity_provenance.prehistory_eligible: bool — focal target existed under the frozen eligibility rule
identity_provenance.focal_tracker_id: int — canonical focal ID (selection uses no outcome)
identity_provenance.checkpoint_bundle_sha256: str — hash binding the exact pre-history snapshot

match_block.m_star: float — per-world target = Z of the direct-relaxation reference on the frozen core mask at fixed t_ref
match_block.m_star_source: str — must be 'direct_relaxation_reference@t_ref'; NEVER any Kovacs excursion or matched branch
match_block.m0_checkpoint_mass: float — per-world pre-history focal mass (sets tol scale)
match_block.A_min: int — frozen minimum release age (common to both branches)

OVER.t_R: int — first step >= A_min at which Z crosses m*

match_block.branch_age_gap: int — |OVER.release_age - APPR.release_age| (covariate; also drives equal-age variant)

common_release_block.boundary_source_sha256: str — must be identical for both branches (one common history-independent no-drive source)
common_release_block.up_ref_value: float — must be the common clamp (0 for primary isolated arm)
common_release_block.up_ref_common: bool — OVER and APPR share up_ref condition exactly
common_release_block.dynamics_params_sha256: str — engine parameter hash; must be identical across branches
common_release_block.probe_free: bool — no N reset, no stimulus, no feeding readout applied
common_release_block.no_manipulation_at_release: bool — no erase/standardize/graft/replace of core Mf; release is pure continuation

sham_block.own_replay_bit_exact: bool — re-run of a branch from its release state reproduces Z_b(t) exactly
sham_block.identical_history_clone_D: float — between-branch D for two SAME-history clones matched to m*; must be 0 (numeric atol)

viability_block.censored: bool — any viability failure censors the world; NEVER imputed as zero

excursion_block.note: Recorded ONLY in a future prospective/DEV-read phase AFTER the design is frozen; absent in Phase 0.
excursion_block.Z_ref_traj: list[float] — direct-relaxation reference Z(t_ref+s), s=0..T_hor (frozen core mask)
excursion_block.D_w_tracked_robustness: float — same on tracked body mass (sign-concordance check)
excursion_block.D_w_equal_age_variant: float — same under equal-age release (age control)

world_classification_inputs.complete: bool — clone_validation AND both_matched AND common_release_block AND sham_block AND viability_block all pass

family_level_gates.N_min: int — frozen minimum complete worlds (proposed >=12 of 24 DEV; confirmatory value set by power analysis at seal)
family_level_gates.primary_unoriented_gate: bool — {D_w} has >=75% common sign AND 95% Student-t interval excludes zero

genuine_null_vs_invalid_match.GENUINE_NULL (Z_SUFFICIENT_NOT_ESTABLISH: N_complete >= N_min AND sham_block clean for all complete worlds AND primary_unoriented_gate == false. The match and common release are demonstrably valid; the absence of divergence is a bounded null, never a sufficiency proof.
genuine_null_vs_invalid_match.INVALID_MATCH (MATCH_INVALID): both_matched fails for more than (24 - N_min) worlds, OR common_release_block/up_ref/viability/one_step_discontinuity fails where estimable, OR identical_history_clone_D != 0. The match or release is not established; neither null nor divergence is interpretable.
genuine_null_vs_invalid_match.HIDDEN_STATE_SUPPORTED: N_complete >= N_min AND sham_block clean AND primary_unoriented_gate AND robustness_sign_concordant AND age_variant_sign_concordant.
genuine_null_vs_invalid_match.UNRESOLVED: validity passes but robustness_sign_concordant or age_variant_sign_concordant is false, or sham anomalies remain, or N_complete < N_min with no clean feasibility failure.
